title: Recipe Pack Compatible│配方包兼容器
description: Recipe pack compatible tools.│配方包兼容工具。
body:
# Function│功能
## BRGC Is Compatible with 6 Stairs│BRGC與6階梯兼容
Makes [Better Recipe Grouping and Categorization](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-recipe-grouping-and-categorization) compatible with [6 Stairs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/six-stairs).│使得[更好的配方群組與分類](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-recipe-grouping-and-categorization)與[6 Stairs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/six-stairs)相容。
### Please enter the following 2 commands in order to ensure that this data package can run normally│請依序輸入下方2條指令以確保此資料包能正常運行
```/datapack disable "file/BRGC_is_compatible_with_6_stairs_1.0.0+1.21.5"```

```/datapack enable "file/BRGC_is_compatible_with_6_stairs_1.0.0+1.21.5" last```
## BRGC Is Compatible with FBMR│BRGC與FBMR兼容
Makes [Better Recipe Grouping and Categorization](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-recipe-grouping-and-categorization) compatible with [Faster Boat and Minecart Recipes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/faster-boat-and-minecart-recipes).│使得[更好的配方群組與分類](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-recipe-grouping-and-categorization)與[更快的船與礦車配方](https://modrinth.com/datapack/faster-boat-and-minecart-recipes)相容。
### Please enter the following 2 commands in order to ensure that this data package can run normally│請依序輸入下方2條指令以確保此資料包能正常運行
```/datapack disable "file/BRGC_is_compatible_with_FBMR_1.0.0+1.21.5"```

```/datapack enable "file/BRGC_is_compatible_with_FBMR_1.0.0+1.21.5" last```
## ASCRM Is Compatible with CP│ASCRM與CP兼容
Makes [All Stones Can as Raw Material](https://modrinth.com/datapack/all-stones-can-as-raw-material) compatible with [Copper Products](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-products).│使得[所有石頭皆可做為原料](https://modrinth.com/datapack/all-stones-can-as-raw-material)與[銅製品](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-products)相容。
### Please enter the following 2 commands in order to ensure that this data package can run normally│請依序輸入下方2條指令以確保此資料包能正常運行
```/datapack disable "file/ASCRM_is_compatible_with_CP_1.0.0+1.21.5"```

```/datapack enable "file/ASCRM_is_compatible_with_CP_1.0.0+1.21.5" last```
## BRGC Is Compatible with MCIRC│BRGC與MCIRC兼容
Makes [Better Recipe Grouping and Categorization](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-recipe-grouping-and-categorization) compatible with [Mod Copper Item Recipes Compatible](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mod-copper-item-recipes-compatible).│使得[更好的配方群組與分類](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-recipe-grouping-and-categorization)與[模組銅物品配方兼容](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mod-copper-item-recipes-compatible)相容。
### Please enter the following 2 commands in order to ensure that this data package can run normally│請依序輸入下方2條指令以確保此資料包能正常運行
```/datapack disable "file/BRGC_is_compatible_with_MCIRC_1.0.0+1.21.5"```

```/datapack enable "file/BRGC_is_compatible_with_MCIRC_1.0.0+1.21.5" last```
## BS Is Compatible with BP│BS與BP兼容
Makes [Broken Stones](https://modrinth.com/datapack/broken-stones) compatible with [Blasting Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blasting-plus).│使得[碎裂的石頭](https://modrinth.com/datapack/broken-stones)與[Blasting Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blasting-plus)相容。
### Please enter the following 2 commands in order to ensure that this data package can run normally│請依序輸入下方2條指令以確保此資料包能正常運行
```/datapack disable "file/BS_is_compatible_with_BP_1.0.0+1.21.5"```

```/datapack enable "file/BS_is_compatible_with_BP_1.0.0+1.21.5" last```
## Burning the Silverfish Is Compatible with BP│Burning the Silverfish與BP兼容
Makes [Burning the Silverfish](https://modrinth.com/datapack/burning-the-silverfish) compatible with [Blasting Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blasting-plus).│使得[燃燒蠹蟲](https://modrinth.com/datapack/burning-the-silverfish)與[Blasting Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blasting-plus)相容。
### Please enter the following 2 commands in order to ensure that this data package can run normally│請依序輸入下方2條指令以確保此資料包能正常運行
```/datapack disable "file/BS_is_compatible_with_BP_1.0.0+1.21.5"```

```/datapack enable "file/BS_is_compatible_with_BP_1.0.0+1.21.5" last```
